subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath rent the veil and revealed that which lay hidden behind the veils of the unseen and concealed in eternity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی کشف الحجاب و اظهر من کان مخزونا فی حجب الغیب و مکنونا فی ازل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
